scripts.cdk:synth: cdk synth --app "npx ts-node --project deployment/tsconfig.json deployment/bin/deployment.ts" --output deployment/cdk.out
scripts.cdk:deploy: cdk deploy --app "npx ts-node --project deployment/tsconfig.json deployment/bin/deployment.ts" --output deployment/cdk.out
scripts.cdk:destroy: cdk destroy --app "npx ts-node --project deployment/tsconfig.json deployment/bin/deployment.ts" --output deployment/cdk.out
